name: Maple Pecan Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1/2 cup Sugar
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
1/4 teaspoon Salt
1/4 cup Raisins
1/4 cup Chopped pecans
2 cups Pumpkin filling (16 oz)
1 1/2 cups Evaporated milk
1 teaspoon Maple flavor
2 slightly beaten Eggs
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1 cup Whipping cream
2 tablespoons Powdered sugar
1/2 teaspoon Maple flavor
Pecan halves
Prepare pie crust, according to package directions, for one crust pie. Refrigerate remaining pie crust for later use. Heat oven to 425 degrees. Place prepared crust into a 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom or a 9-inch pie pan. Press into bottom and up sides of pan. Trim edges if necessary.
In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; blend well. Carefully pour into pie crust-lined pan. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. Cool. In a small bowl, beat cream until soft peaks form. Blend in powdered sugar and maple flavor; beat until stiff peaks form. Spoon or pipe over filling. Garnish with pecan halves. Store in refrigerator.
